CustomMetadata.label: SA-010 - No login IP restriction on Syst

values.value: No login IP restriction on System Administrator profile
The System Administrator profile has no LoginIpRange records configured. Admin accounts can be accessed from any network globally, including untrusted networks.
Admin accounts accessible from any IP are vulnerable to credential-based attacks from global threat actors. There is no network-level control preventing access from untrusted locations.
Configure Login IP Ranges on the System Administrator profile in Setup > Profiles > System Administrator > Login IP Ranges. Restrict to known office network ranges and VPN egress IPs.
